name: AIbrief Feed Pipeline
summary: Generate the static AIbrief briefing files from public AI signals.
context: Use for normal scheduled briefing generation and static output refreshes.

name: Logged-in X Intel Collector
summary: Collect public X posts for AI, defense, military, and strategic technology intelligence.
context: Use when the task asks for public X posts, military AI claims, influencer monitoring, or X freshness.

name: Birdclaw Local Export Importer
summary: Import a private local Birdclaw export and normalize public tweet records while skipping DMs.
context: Use only for local/private exports. Never expose private paths or DM content on the website.

name: Breaking X Intel Monitor
summary: Publish website-only breaking X intelligence without sending notifications.
context: Use for the public breaking-status feed, relevance thresholds, dedupe state, and freshness diagnostics.

name: Gemini/Groq LLM Router
summary: Route summarization and ranking requests through Gemini or Groq with rule-based fallback.
context: Use when debugging model keys, provider fallback, summarization quality, or signal scoring.

name: ntfy Morning Digest
summary: Send a zero-cost morning phone digest through ntfy only when explicitly scheduled or requested.
context: Use for the 8 AM digest path. Do not hardcode topics or expose notification secrets.

name: Render Static Website Deployment
summary: Serve the generated AIbrief static website from the web directory on Render.
context: Use for Render configuration, static output checks, redirects, and public website deployment.

name: GitHub Actions Workflow Runner
summary: Run scheduled and manual GitHub Actions workflows for feed generation and breaking updates.
context: Use for workflow YAML, secret wiring, Node action versions, schedules, and CI diagnostics.

name: Freshness and Health Checks
summary: Validate generated JSON, freshness age, health output, and static site existence.
context: Use to prove the generated website files are current, parseable, and deployable.

name: Secret Safety Scanner
summary: Check generated files and logs for leaked secrets, tokens, cookies, and private topics.
context: Use whenever secrets, cookies, API keys, ntfy topics, or private local exports are involved.

name: Agent-Reach Optional Social Connector
summary: Collect optional social and video records from Agent-Reach when the package is available.
context: Use for optional social-source enrichment. The main pipeline must continue if this package is absent.

name: Command Center Dashboard Builder
summary: Render the AIbrief command center pages, filters, status panels, and briefing cards.
context: Use for visible website changes, public labels, filters, layout, and generated HTML safety.
